hero.subtitle: Data Engineer & Analytics Specialist
hero.description: I build indestructible tracking systems. I help businesses bypass adblockers, fix broken GA4 data, and implement Server-Side tagging so your marketing actually works.

whoami.label: // Who Am I
whoami.heading: About Me
whoami.bio1: I'm a Data Engineer & Analytics Specialist who architects resilient, server-side tracking infrastructure for brands that refuse to fly blind. My systems bypass adblockers, survive browser restrictions, and deliver the clean data your marketing team actually needs.
whoami.bio2: From building custom GTM containers to deploying first-party data pipelines on cloud infrastructure, I operate at the intersection of marketing technology and data engineering — where precision meets scale.

highlight1.title: Server-Side Infra
highlight1.desc: Custom-built tracking servers that bypass client-side limitations.

highlight2.title: Data Pipelines
highlight2.desc: Automated ETL flows from raw events to actionable dashboards.

highlight4.title: Real-Time Processing
highlight4.desc: Sub-second event processing for live campaign optimization.

services.label: // Services
services.heading: What I Deliver
services.modalDescription: Leave your details and I'll reach out to discuss this service.
services.modalSuccess: Thanks for the interest in this service, I will reach you out shortly to discuss further, be sure to check your spam folder.

contact.label: // Contact
contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.description: Most companies are losing 30% of their analytics to adblockers. I build first-party, server-side tracking pipelines that capture every click and bypass the noise. Let's fix your broken data.
contact.formMessage: Tell me about your data challenge...
contact.successNote: Check your spam folder if you haven't received a confirmation

sandbox.label: // Lab
sandbox.title: JavaScript Sandbox
sandbox.description: Live-execution experiments. Each card runs in an isolated iframe — click to reveal and activate.
